chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-462 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.11.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ali Gopang, advocate for petitioners Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** Learned counsel for the petitioners states at Bar that grievance of the petitioners has been redressed, therefore, he under instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
